```typescript
import parseua from 'next/dist/compiled/ua-parser-js'

interface UserAgent {
  isBot: boolean
  ua: string
  browser: {
    name?: string
    version?: string
    major?: string
  }
  device: {
    model?: string
    type?: string
    vendor?: string
  }
  engine: {
    name?: string
    version?: string
  }
  os: {
    name?: string
    version?: string
  }
  cpu: {
    architecture?: string
  }
}

export function isBot(input: string): boolean {
  return /Googlebot|Mediapartners-Google|AdsBot-Google|googleweblight|Storebot-Google|Google-PageRenderer|Google-InspectionTool|Bingbot|BingPreview|Slurp|DuckDuckBot|baiduspider|yandex|sogou|LinkedInBot|bitlybot|tumblr|vkShare|quora link preview|facebookexternalhit|facebookcatalog|Twitterbot|applebot|redditbot|Slackbot|Discordbot|WhatsApp|SkypeUriPreview|ia_archiver|GPTBot/i.test(
    input
  )
}

export function userAgentFromString(input: string | undefined): UserAgent {
  return {
    ...parseua(input),
    isBot: input === undefined ? false : isBot(input),
  }
}

export function userAgent({ headers }: { headers: Headers }): UserAgent {
  return userAgentFromString(headers.get('user-agent') || undefined)
}
```

1	export interface Geo {
2	  city?: string
3	  country?: string
4	  countryCode?: string
5	  region?: string
6	  latitude?: string
7	  longitude?: string
8	  timezone?: string
9	}
10	
11	const COUNTRY_NAMES: Record<string, string> = {
12	  AU: 'Australia',
13	  BR: 'Brazil',
14	  CA: 'Canada',
15	  CN: 'China',
16	  DE: 'Germany',
17	  FR: 'France',
18	  GB: 'United Kingdom',
19	  IN: 'India',
20	  JP: 'Japan',
21	  US: 'United States',
22	}
23	
24	export function geoFromHeaders(headers: Headers): Geo {
25	  const city = headers.get('x-vercel-ip-city') ?? undefined
26	  const vercelCountry = headers.get('x-vercel-ip-country') ?? undefined
27	  const cfCountry = headers.get('cf-ipcountry') ?? undefined
28	  const countryCode = vercelCountry ?? cfCountry
29	  const country =
30	    countryCode !== undefined ? COUNTRY_NAMES[countryCode] : undefined
31	  const region = headers.get('x-vercel-ip-country-region') ?? undefined
32	  const latitude = headers.get('x-vercel-ip-latitude') ?? undefined
33	  const longitude = headers.get('x-vercel-ip-longitude') ?? undefined
34	  const timezone = headers.get('x-vercel-ip-timezone') ?? undefined
35	
36	  return { city, country, countryCode, region, latitude, longitude, timezone }
37	}
38	
39	export function geo({ headers }: { headers: Headers }): Geo {
40	  return geoFromHeaders(headers)
41	}
42	
43	export function isInRegion(geo: Geo, regions: string[]): boolean {
44	  if (geo.countryCode === undefined) return false
45	  const code = geo.countryCode.toUpperCase()
46	  return regions.some((r) => r.toUpperCase() === code)
47	}
48	
49	export function geoDistance(
50	  lat1: string,
51	  lon1: string,
52	  lat2: string,
53	  lon2: string
54	): number {
55	  const R = 6371 // Earth's radius in km
56	  const toRad = (deg: number) => (deg * Math.PI) / 180
57	
58	  const φ1 = toRad(parseFloat(lat1))
59	  const φ2 = toRad(parseFloat(lat2))
60	  const Δφ = toRad(parseFloat(lat2) - parseFloat(lat1))
61	  const Δλ = toRad(parseFloat(lon2) - parseFloat(lon1))
62	
63	  const a =
64	    Math.sin(Δφ / 2) * Math.sin(Δφ / 2) +
65	    Math.cos(φ1) * Math.cos(φ2) * Math.sin(Δλ / 2) * Math.sin(Δλ / 2)
66	
67	  const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a))
68	
69	  return R * c
70	}
